questions.question: Explain virtual machines with a neat diagram. Discuss the benefits of using virtual machines.
keyPoints: VM is a software-based emulation of physical hardware
Draw diagram showing VMs running on hypervisor on hardware
Benefits: isolation, server consolidation, testing, security, snapshots, live migration

questions.question: Compare Type 1 and Type 2 hypervisors with examples.
keyPoints: Type 1 runs directly on hardware (ESXi, Hyper-V, Xen)
Type 2 runs on host OS (VirtualBox, VMware Workstation)
Type 1 has better performance and security
Type 2 is easier to set up, used for desktop/development

questions.question: What is para-virtualization? How does it differ from full virtualization?
keyPoints: Para-virtualization: guest OS is modified to make hypercalls
Full virtualization: unmodified guest OS, privileged instructions are trapped and emulated
Para-virtualization requires access to guest OS source code
